summary: Unusual Brent keyboard intro after Cold Rain and Snow noted; recording quality not described.
review: The sole reviewer points out a rare post‑song keyboard tease by Brent, repeating the intro to Cold Rain and Snow after the song had already been performed. No comments are made about the audio fidelity or source, so the technical quality of this tape remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rated review focusing on a quirky performance detail; no information on sound quality, so rating is tentative.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention clarity, mix balance, or any recording issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer highlights an atypical post‑song keyboard tune‑up after Cold Rain and Snow, indicating a unique moment rather than overall performance quality.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent repeats the intro to Cold Rain and Snow after the song, an unusual post‑song tease.
